series_metadata.series_description: Records received or generated by the agency in relation to requests for public records. Records may include: the request, correspondence, logs, folders, responsive records, Public Record Request Log, Public Record Request Worksheet, invoices, and any other documentation relating to a request for public records.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for three (3) calendar years from the date of the request. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying these records. ; Electronic: Retain for three (3) calendar years from the date of the request. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying these records., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
